frontmatter_compliance.notes: All required fields present; semver 1.1.0; canonical hyphenated allowed-tools; no </> in frontmatter; composes_with targets exist.

description_quality.notes: 729 chars, well under 1024 ceiling; strong trigger coverage with 7 phrases; could lose ~200 chars by removing inline gate recital.

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 89 lines / 962 words; three references each linked with when-to-read pointers.

instruction_clarity.notes: Imperative voice; explains WHY (e.g., 'Why this gate matters' line 29); ordered steps.

coordination.notes: owns.patterns scoped to CONTEXT.md + docs/adr/**; no overlap; composes_with lists real skills.

completeness.notes: All three reference files exist and are linked; thorough worked examples in adr-format.md and context-format.md.

anti_patterns.notes: No emojis; one MUST/Forbidden callout with rationale; no hardcoded project paths.

important.fix: Drop the inline three-condition recital (already in body); keep one summary clause + 7 trigger phrases
